architecture.summary: Custom router with DELETE support, skill-resolver for path resolution, scanSkills for listing, StudioContext for selection state

integrations.summary: No external integrations, self-contained eval-ui + eval-server

ui-ux.summary: DetailHeader for skill header, SkillCard for sidebar, inline CSS-in-JS + Tailwind, confirmation dialog needed

security.summary: Only source skills deletable, installed skills read-only, path traversal prevention via resolveSkillDir

edge-cases.summary: Delete while benchmark running, delete last skill, confirm dialog cancel, filesystem errors

performance.summary: Single directory rm, sidebar refresh via existing loadSkills, no performance concerns
